summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AI Accounting Copilot Beta-Ready MVP. Backend APIs highly functional with 18/19 tests passing. All core features including AI extraction, document processing, voucher creation, activity logging, and vendor learning working correctly. Frontend UI navigation and core functionality working well with proper authentication flow.

flaky_endpoints.issue: Returns 403 Insufficient permissions when testing with regular user
flaky_endpoints.impact: Admin subscription activation requires admin role - expected behavior

integration_issues.issue: Session expires during extended testing, requiring re-login

passed_tests: Documents Page Navigation with Upload UI
Billing Page with Subscription Plans Display
